textByHashes.6da49c6767480b821a201e9564dccab2f631d99c: There's been an influx of new business to these ruins. Shantay sent us out here to make some money.
textByHashes.7ce95b88c1e4196a2248ae118d94c9e56b9c4566: Have you seen the state of this place? We're helping to provide vital repair costs to the people!
textByHashes.b2704f2188cbba673a52dae06fa8a15d048a85b1: Not really our fault if they spend their cut on fancy outfits!
textByHashes.bc5b0a3463a189ac2b2ccc81e9d312abd92dc92c: Sorry friend, the Shantay Pass is 5 gold coins. You don't seem to have enough money!
textByHashes.d6836a8f32920e2cf67921863454dcd876ba9e3c: Go talk to Shantay. I'm on duty and I don't have time to talk to the likes of you!
textByHashes.3c6e04f54302b38628be43490e71d6a54b0d7b60: Hello there! What can I do for you?
textByHashes.22e0d5b455c9d1ccf111673bc95c25c0e3d9bb50: You'll need a Shantay pass to go through the gate into the desert. See Shantay, he'll sell you one for a very reasonable price.
textByHashes.001f9495542f8f47a88f95191ee81bb379633907: Okay then, have a nice day.
